doc_content.summary: Automates the release process by analyzing unreleased changelog entries, auto-detecting semantic version bumps, updating runtime versions, and publishing Git tags and GitHub Releases on behalf of the user.
key_features: Pre-flight validation for a clean main branch
Auto-detection of semantic version bump type (patch/minor/major) from changelog sections
Updates runtime version in __init__.py and moves [Unreleased] changelog entries to a newly versioned section
Creates annotated git tags and publishes GitHub releases securely using the user's native Personal Access Token
usage_examples: Please cut a new release based on the latest merged changes.

alt_text: A documentation page titled 'stark-release - Skill Visualization' showing a flowchart of the release management process including pre-flight checks, changelog review, file updates, and GitHub release creation, alongside rules and failure modes.
